emails.subject: beers
emails.body: beers Hey, I'd like to know if I could buy you a beer sometime and pick your brain on how things work in the NW term trading world. I'm one of the NW mid-marketers now (4 of us total) and I'd like to know in advance how to best work with you, add value, and not be a pain in your ass. Let me know if this is OK. You pick the time place. Thanks! Andrea Woodland

emails.subject: RE: beers
emails.body: RE: beers how about next Tuesday or Thursday in the late afternoon is fine.... it would be good to get on the same page with what we're doin in the market!! Thanks, let me know whcih day is best for you, Mike To: Swerzbin, Mike

emails.subject: RE: beers
emails.body: How about Tuesday. I can go anytime you want. Just holler when you're ready. Great news about UBS! To: Woodland, Andrea
